home.title: Bid with confidence on MazadJo
home.description: Browse listings, follow live bid history, and manage your account from one place.
home.activeAuctionsDescription: Recently listed live auctions from the API.
home.noActiveDescription: Start MazadJo_Backend and run seed_demo_auctions, or check back later.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search for cars, electronics, real estate...

features.title: Why choose MazadJo?
features.description: Jordan's most transparent and interactive live bidding experience.

staffReviewed.title: Staff reviewed
staffReviewed.description: Every auction listing is verified by staff before going live.

realTimeBids.title: Real-time bids
realTimeBids.description: Instant updates on bidding activity and countdowns.

localSupport.title: Local support
localSupport.description: Bids in Jordanian Dinar (JOD) with local delivery rules.

mobileOptimized.title: Mobile optimized
mobileOptimized.description: Bid, create drafts, and monitor on any screen size.

auctions.title: Auctions
auctions.description: Search listings, filter by status, and jump into live auctions across Jordan.
auctions.browseDescription: Filter by status or refine with search.
auctions.searchPlaceholder: Search for cars, electronics, real estate...
auctions.noResultsDescription: Try another filter or seed demo data on the backend.
auctions.loadError: Could not load auctions. Is MazadJo_Backend running on port 8000?

auctionDetail.noPhotos: No photos for this listing yet.

bids.title: Bid history
bids.pageDescription: Track bids and place your offer on {title}. Current price: {price}.
bids.recentBidsDescription: Latest activity on this listing, newest first.
bids.emptyDescription: Be the first to place a bid when the auction is active.

bidForm.signInToBid: Sign in to place a bid

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.description: Explore product categories, listing rules, and locations across Jordan — everything you need before you bid or sell.
catalog.categoriesDescription: Pick a category to see listing rules, fees, and requirements.
catalog.countriesDescription: Supported markets and country codes in the MazadJo catalog.
catalog.locationDescription: Drill down from country to city and area for listing locations.
catalog.noCategoriesDescription: Run seed_catalog or seed_demo_auctions on the backend.
catalog.loadError: Could not load catalog data from the API.
catalog.rulesSectionDescription: Requirements and pricing before you create a listing.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.emptyDescription: Check back later or contact support.

about.title: About MazadJo
about.description: Who we are and why sellers and bidders choose us.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.emptyDescription: No active contact record on the server.

terms.title: Terms & conditions
terms.emptyDescription: Terms have not been published yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.myAuctionsDescription: Listings you created as a seller.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create your first listing to start selling on MazadJo.

listings.submitDescription: Staff will review your listing before it goes live. Make sure photos and details are complete.
listings.cancelDescription: This cannot be undone. Live or ended auctions cannot be cancelled.

listingWizard.createDescription: Fill in details and save a draft. You can add photos on the next step.
listingWizard.editDescription: Update details, upload photos, then submit for staff review.
listingWizard.detailsDescription: Category rules apply to prices, photos, and location.
listingWizard.title: Title
listingWizard.photosHint: Upload clear photos of your item. Staff may reject listings with too few images.
listingWizard.photosAfterSave: Save the draft first, then you can upload photos and videos.
listingWizard.mediaHint: Rules come from your category: minimum/maximum photos, optional video, and allowed file types.
listingWizard.videoNotAllowed: Video is not allowed for this category
listingWizard.videoTooLong: Video is too long ({actual}). Maximum allowed is {max} seconds.
listingWizard.videoDurationUnknown: Could not read video length. Try another file.
listingWizard.submitNeedsPhotos: Upload the minimum number of photos before submitting
listingWizard.readOnlyDescription: This listing is in status “{status}” and is read-only.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your account details and verification status.

admin.title: Admin
admin.comingSoon: Admin tools are not available yet.

auth.signInPageDescription: Sign in to bid and manage your account.
auth.signInCardDescription: Use your MazadJo username and password.
auth.accountDisabled: This account is disabled. Contact support.
auth.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Is MazadJo_Backend running?
auth.registerPageDescription: Join MazadJo to bid on live auctions.
auth.forgotPasswordPageDescription: We will help you recover access to your account.
auth.forgotPasswordCardDescription: We'll send a code to the email or phone on your account.
auth.confirmResetDescription: Enter the code we sent and choose a new password.
auth.devOtpHint: Dev tip: with FIXED_OTP=True on the API, use code {code}.
auth.resetCodeSent: If an account exists, a reset code was sent
auth.passwordUpdated: Password updated — you can sign in
auth.fixFormErrors: Please fix the errors in the form
auth.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid Jordan number (9 digits, starts with 7)
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.destinationRequired: Enter your email or phone number
auth.splitWhoUsFallback: MazadJo is Jordan's live auction marketplace — connecting sellers and bidders with transparent listings and real-time bidding.
auth.splitWhyUsFallback: Staff-reviewed listings, category-driven rules, and secure accounts give everyone confidence to buy and sell.
auth.registerFormHint: Verify your phone with OTP. If you add an email, verify it too.
auth.registrationFailedApi: Registration failed. Check that the API is running.
auth.accountCreatedPleaseSignIn: Account created. Please sign in manually.
auth.enterValidPhoneFirst: Enter a valid phone number first
auth.verifyPhoneFirst: Verify your phone number with OTP
